scripts.dev: bun run --filter cadera-backend dev & bun run --filter cadera-frontend dev
scripts.format: bun run --filter cadera-backend format & bun run --filter cadera-frontend format
scripts.format:check: bun run --filter cadera-backend format:check & bun run --filter cadera-frontend format:check
scripts.clean: bun run --filter '*' clean && rm -rf node_modules bun.lock
